name: Watermelon
description: One hot summer day Pete and his friend Billy decided to buy a watermelon. Choose if it can be divided into two even parts.
author: Codeforces

name: Way Too Long Words
description: Abbreviate words that are strictly longer than 10 characters by writing the first and last character separated by word length minus 2.
author: Codeforces

name: Next Round
description: Contestant who earns a score equal to or greater than the k-th place finisher's score will advance to the next round.
author: Codeforces

name: Domino Piling
description: You are given a rectangular board of M x N squares. Find the maximum number of 2x1 dominoes that can be placed on the board.
author: Codeforces

name: Bit++
description: Execute a sequence of ++X, X++, --X, X-- statements starting from 0.
author: Codeforces

name: Theatre Square
description: Theatre Square in the capital city of Berland has a rectangular shape of n x m meters. Find minimum number of a x a flagstones to pave it.
author: Codeforces

name: String Task
description: Petya started to attend programming lessons. Delete all vowels, insert '.' before each consonant, convert to lowercase.
author: Codeforces

name: Petya and Strings
description: Compare two strings lexicographically regardless of character case.
author: Codeforces

name: Football
description: A situation is dangerous if there are at least 7 consecutive players of the same team.
author: Codeforces

name: Young Physicist
description: Given n force vectors, determine if the body is in equilibrium (sum of all x, y, z components is zero).
author: Codeforces

name: Chat room
description: Determine if string 'hello' appears as a subsequence in the typed input string.
author: Codeforces

name: Lucky Division
description: Petya calls a number almost lucky if it is divisible by a lucky number (composed only of digits 4 and 7).
author: Codeforces

name: Registration System
description: Implement a name registration system using a hash map that appends numbers for duplicate usernames.
author: Codeforces

name: Cut Ribbon
description: Given ribbon of length n, cut it into maximum number of pieces of lengths a, b, or c.
author: Codeforces

name: Given Length and Sum of Digits
description: Find the smallest and largest non-negative numbers of length m with sum of digits s.
author: Codeforces

name: Kefa and First Steps
description: Kefa wants to find the maximum length of a non-decreasing subsegment in an array.
author: Codeforces

name: Boring Apartments
description: Count total keypresses to reach a specific boring apartment number.
author: Codeforces

name: Two Arrays And Swaps
description: Maximize the sum of array A by swapping at most k elements with array B.
author: Codeforces

name: Cheap Travel
description: Find the minimum cost to ride the subway n times using single and m-ride tickets.
author: Codeforces

name: Vanya and Lanterns
description: Vanya walks along a street of length l. Find minimum light radius d to light up the whole street.
author: Codeforces

name: IQ Test
description: Find the index of the single number that differs in parity (evenness/oddness) from all others.
author: Codeforces

name: T-primes
description: Determine if given numbers are T-prime (have exactly three distinct positive divisors).
author: Codeforces

name: Product of Three Numbers
description: Represent integer n as product of 3 distinct integers a * b * c > 1.
author: Codeforces

name: Productive Meeting
description: Maximize total 2-person talk meetings given sociability points of each person.
author: Codeforces

name: Tree Distances I
description: For each node in a tree, calculate maximum distance to any other node.
author: Codeforces
